attacking_style: Early breakaway specialist who pre-selects stages strategically. Makes multiple hard attacks to force selections, but can empty himself before final climbs.
team_tactics: Operates independently in breakaways rather than relying on team support. Makes tactical equipment choices (climbing bike vs aero) based on pre-race stage reconnaissance.
terrain_preference: Stages with climbs that fracture breakaways and create maximum time gaps when peloton misjudges chase. Exposed on decisive climbs after expending energy in earlier attacks.
vulnerability: Executing too many hard efforts before critical climbs, leaving him unable to respond when decisive moves occur. Reliant on peloton mistakes for breakaway success.
key_patterns: Pre-selects target stages from race book and prepares equipment accordingly (2018 Vuelta)
Makes multiple attacking efforts to force breakaway selections before final challenges (both races)
Vulnerable after self-inflicted depletion; dropped when fresher riders attack late (2019 TDF)
Breakaway success dependent on peloton control failures rather than pure strength (2018 Vuelta)
form_trajectory: negative: 2019 TDF showed attacking pattern leading to premature exhaustion, unable to finish decisive moves
